title: One Piece Custom GUI Pack
description: One Piece Custom GUI Pack :) enjoy
body: **![Preview](https://i.imgur.com/H8vkiEt.jpeg)** ### **Introduction:** This is a **GUI-only resource pack**, so you can freely use it alongside other resource packs just place it **on top** of the one you already use. This pack is themed after *“One Piece”*, with a **dark ocean blue, orange, and light blue** palette. I’ve also customized the hot bar and added unique pictures for each container to match the theme. Unlike some of my other packs, this one includes **scaled containers**, which required a lot of work and re-adjustments, making it stand out even more. If you’d like to see other color options in the future — such as **white & black** or anything else feel free to share your suggestions, and I’ll consider them. If you find any bugs, please report them so I can fix them as soon as possible. Community Engagement: Join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph) to suggest future packs, participate in anime discussions, and enter monthly giveaways for Discord Nitro! [ ](https://listar-mc.net/) [ ] 🔗 Visit our relaunched website for more content, packs, and updates! ### **Images:** * **Settings** ![](https://i.imgur.com/0YGuCHk.jpeg) * **HUD** ![](https://i.imgur.com/BpTuDYv.png) * **Creative Menu** ![](https://i.imgur.com/4YkMRLZ.png) * **Anvil** ![](https://i.imgur.com/7IwZRW8.png) * **Brewing Stand** ![](https://i.imgur.com/1QZtEPW.png) * **Smithing Table** ![](https://i.imgur.com/Eb9AfXT.png) * **Loom** ![](https://i.imgur.com/4KRTnSB.png) * **Beacon Menu** ![](https://i.imgur.com/VKfMQKY.png) * **Dispenser** ![](https://i.imgur.com/5UsBNtZ.png) * **Villager Trading Menu** ![](https://i.imgur.com/tTqrbUA.png) ### **Additional Resources:** * 🌐 [Explore more packs on our website](https://listar-mc.net) * 💬 [Join our Discord](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph) to suggest future packs, vote on designs, and chat about anime. ### ❤️ **Thank You for Your Support!** Your feedback and suggestions help improve these packs — enjoy and have fun!
